title: Surgeon Vacancy at Natco Pharma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Natco Pharma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
